title: Medcenter (disambiguation)
content:
There were many notable '''[[Medcenter/Legends|medcenters]]''' throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. You may be looking for one of these:

*The [[Aldera Universal Medcenter]]
*The [[Brathflen Corporation's Medcenter]]
*The [[Carosi Alpha Hospital]]
*The [[Central Academic Hospital]]
*The [[Coronet Medcenter]]
*The [[Fobosi District Medcenter]]
*The [[Galactic Senate Medcenter/Legends|Galactic Senate Medcenter]], also called the Senate Hospital.
*The [[Lamoramora Medcenter]]
*The [[N-One Medcenter]] of the original [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]
*The [[Orowood Medcenter]]
*The [[XQ2 Platform]] [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|''Hospital'']]
*The [[Republic Central Medcenter/Legends|Republic Central Medcenter]]

{{Disambig}}
